startHand.dialogDescriptionActions: There are previously recorded actions. How would you like to proceed?
startHand.dialogDescriptionSetup: Player settings are saved. How would you like to proceed?
startHand.newDesc: Reset all data and start fresh

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in with your Google account
login.toastUnexpectedErrorDesc: An unexpected error occurred during login.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.toastPasswordMismatchDesc: The two passwords you entered are different.
signup.toastNeedTermsDesc: Please agree to the Terms of Service.
signup.toastUnexpectedErrorDesc: Please try again in a moment.

marketing.heroDescription: Record actions as an event timeline and replay the same hand accurately anytime. Built for fast input, reliable replay, and a clear review flow.
marketing.featureItem2: Undo / Redo / Jump at any point
marketing.howItWorksDescription: A simple workflow built on a reliable replay model.
marketing.step1Description: Log actions and reveals as timeline events. Clean input with rule-safe flow.
marketing.step2Description: Pot, stacks, turn order, and constraints are computed from events automatically.
marketing.step3Description: Undo, redo, or jump anywhere. The event log remains the single source of truth.
marketing.coreFeaturesDescription: Only what you need for reliable hand review.
marketing.core1Description: Store events—not UI state. Replays stay consistent, deterministic, and debuggable.
marketing.core2Description: Move through hands quickly and verify key decisions without friction.
marketing.core3Description: Minimal clicks with validation so action order stays correct.
marketing.core4Description: Organize hands and replay any spot from your dashboard.
marketing.ctaDescription: Record one hand now and review it precisely with an event-timeline model.

startHub.description: Jump straight into hand review, then open dedicated tools like Outs, Odds, and Insurance from the tool hub. Use everything without login, and sign in only when you want to save.
startHub.cardReviewDescription: Go from setup to action recording immediately.
startHub.cardToolsDescription: Entry point for Outs, Odds, and Insurance calculators.
startHub.cardResumeDescription: If a temporary session exists, move to the exact step automatically.
startHub.policyBody: Hand review and calculators are available without login. Saving, history, and sync features require login.

toolsHub.title: Calculation Tools
toolsHub.description: We are adding practical tools alongside hand review. Outs, Odds, and Insurance calculators are the first set.
toolsHub.outsDescription: Check next-card outs for the currently trailing player in heads-up and multiway spots.
toolsHub.oddsDescription: Calculate pot odds and required equity quickly.
toolsHub.insuranceDescription: Compute insurance amounts for practical dealer/player use.

outsTool.overviewTitle: See only the trailing player's outs
outsTool.overviewDescription: The top shows who has how many outs at a glance. The bottom shows the actual out cards. Calculations use the next single card on flop and turn.
outsTool.waitingForBoard: Current leaders appear after the flop is set.
outsTool.inputsDescription: Enter player hands and the board only. Add players when you want to switch from heads-up to multiway.
outsTool.actualCardsDescription: Shows next-card outs card-by-card for each player who is currently behind.
outsTool.requiresFlop: Turn can be selected only after all 3 flop cards are set.
outsTool.requiresTurn: River can be selected only after turn is set.
outsTool.needCompleteHands: Enter both hole cards for every active player.
outsTool.needFlop: Set all 3 flop cards before calculating outs.
outsTool.invalidBoard: Only 3 to 5 board cards are supported.
outsTool.allPlayersTied: Everyone is currently tied for the lead, so there is no trailing player to show.
outsTool.riverComplete: The river is complete, so there are no more next-card outs.

dashboard.gateTitle: Sign in to use your dashboard
dashboard.gateDescription: Log in to access saved hands and review tools.
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Start a new hand and review your latest sessions quickly.
dashboard.recentEmptyDescription: Start your first hand and it will show up here.
dashboard.notFoundDescription: Try changing your search keywords or category.
dashboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this hand?
dashboard.toastLoadFailedDesc: An error occurred while loading the hand list.
dashboard.toastDeleteFailedDesc: An error occurred while deleting the hand.

setup.title: Game Setup
setup.bottomInfo: Settings can be changed anytime before starting the review.
setup.errorSmallBlindMustBeLess: Small Blind must be less than Big Blind.
setup.errorAnteRequired: Enter an ante amount for the selected mode.
setup.stackPresetNeedsBb: Enter Big Blind first to use stack presets.
setup.averageStackHint: If empty, average stack defaults to 100BB.
setup.anteDisabledHint: Ante amount is disabled when mode is set to None.
setup.bbAnteReadonlyHint: BB Ante amount always follows the Big Blind value.

players.title: Player Settings
players.startNewActionDescription: Game setup and player settings are kept. Only action history will be reset.

record.title: Record Action
record.toastLoginRequiredDesc: Please log in to save the hand.
record.toastDealerMissing: Dealer button position is not set.
record.toastSaveFailedDesc: An error occurred while saving the hand.

exitDialog.title: Are you sure you want to exit?
exitDialog.description: All actions will be reset. Player settings will be preserved.

resumeDialog.title: Existing record found
resumeDialog.description: There are previously recorded actions. How would you like to proceed?
resumeDialog.newHandDescription: Reset actions and start fresh (player settings preserved)

saveDialog.title: Save Hand
saveDialog.description: Set the title and tags for the hand. (Optional)

actionPanel.completedLine2: Save this hand to continue review later.

policyTerms.title: Terms of Service
policyTerms.summary: Please review these terms before using Poker Hand Review. By continuing to use the service, you agree to these terms.
policyTerms.quickSummary1: This is an educational hand replay tool, not a gambling platform.
policyTerms.quickSummary2: You are responsible for account activity and uploaded hand data.
policyTerms.quickSummary3: Abusive automation, reverse engineering, and illegal use are prohibited.

overview.title: Service scope
overview.body: Poker Hand Review provides hand recording and replay features for study and review. We do not host real-money betting or provide gambling operations.

eligibility.title: Who can use the service
eligibility.body: The service is available to all users. If local law requires guardian consent for minors, users are responsible for complying with that requirement.

scope.title: Current product scope
scope.body: The current service is focused on core hand review features. Feature and plan structure may evolve over time.
scope.noteBody: If paid plans are introduced later, billing and refund details will be announced before launch.

disclaimer.title: No outcome guarantee
disclaimer.body: This service is for educational analysis. We do not guarantee game outcomes, and we are not responsible for financial decisions made from reviewed hands.

rules.title: Prohibited conduct
rules.item1: Automated scraping, bot traffic, or unauthorized crawling.
rules.item2: Reverse engineering, exploit attempts, or intentional service disruption.
rules.item3: Account sharing or impersonation intended to bypass controls.
rules.item4: Illegal use, fraud, or promotion of unlawful gambling activity.

governingLaw.title: Governing law and jurisdiction
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by the laws specified by service operation policy. Disputes are handled by the competent court in that jurisdiction unless otherwise required by applicable consumer law.

changes.title: Policy updates
changes.body: We may update these terms to reflect product or legal changes. Material updates will be posted on this page with a revised update date.

policyTerms.contactBody: For policy questions or legal requests, contact:
policyTerms.footerNote: These terms apply to all users of Poker Hand Review services.

policyPrivacy.title: Privacy Policy
policyPrivacy.summary: This page explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how you can control your data when using Poker Hand Review.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.accountBody: Email, display name, and authentication identifiers needed to run your account.
collect.handBody: Hand configurations, action timelines, and review records you create.
collect.deviceBody: Basic device/browser logs required for reliability, security, and troubleshooting.

use.title: How we use information
use.item1: Deliver core features such as hand setup, replay, and history.
use.item2: Maintain account state, save progress, and recover sessions.
use.item3: Improve product quality, respond to support requests, and protect service security.

vendor.title: Third-party services
vendor.body: We use trusted infrastructure providers to operate the service.
vendor.supabaseBody: Authentication and database infrastructure for account and hand data.

retention.title: How long data is kept
retention.body: Data is retained while your account is active, or as needed for legal/security obligations. You may request deletion at any time.

rights.title: Control over your data
rights.item1: Access and update your profile information.
rights.item2: Delete saved hand records from your account.
rights.item3: Request account deletion and associated data removal.

accountDelete.title: Account deletion
accountDelete.body: When account deletion is requested, related personal data is removed according to operational and legal requirements.

security.title: How we protect data
security.body: We apply technical and organizational safeguards, but no system can guarantee absolute security for all network conditions.

contact.title: Privacy inquiries
contact.body: For privacy requests or questions about this policy, contact:

policyPrivacy.footerNote: We only process data needed to provide and improve core service functions.

policyContact.title: Contact & Support
policyContact.summary: Send us bug reports, account questions, and partnership inquiries. The fastest path is email.

direct.title: Email support
direct.body: For most requests, email is the fastest and most reliable support channel.

response.title: Typical response time
response.body: Most messages are answered within 24 to 48 hours on weekdays.

privacy.title: Before you send
privacy.body: Please avoid sharing passwords, card numbers, or other sensitive financial information in email.

form.title: Compose an email draft
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your issue or request in detail.
form.helper: This form opens your default email client with a pre-filled draft.
form.errorRequired: Please enter both email and message.

policyContact.footerNote: For urgent account/security matters, include clear context and your account email.

navUserArea.saveProgressDescription: You can resume where you left off next time.

settings.title: User Settings
settings.description: You can update your profile username.
settings.toastSaveSuccessDesc: Your new username has been saved to your profile.

errors.tooShort: Username must be at least 2 characters.
errors.tooLong: Username must be 24 characters or fewer.
errors.unknown: Please try again in a moment.
